primary_flags.summary: First explicit false allegation cluster. Apr 22 2023. ROW-2373: 'And Abby doesn't need to tell her that she can't have a treat if she tells me what's going on. That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' — sexual character slur against Abby + false suppression allegation (Abby told Olivia not to share with Melissa). ROW-2374: 'You both shouldn't be telling her not to tell me stuff. That's shady.' Category C (incest-framing character attack against Abby/Eli unit) + PROJ-003 candidate (Melissa accuses Eli/Abby of coaching suppression while coaching admission ROW-6819 is in record). ARC-RF15-001 WATCHING confirmed.

primary_flags.cross_rf_note: RF-04 B-007 RF04-B007-002 (Sev-2) is the primary RF-04 flag for this cluster. RF-15 primary promoted from RF-04 compound. Context: Eli left Olivia briefly in car; Melissa claims Abby coached Olivia's reporting.
